prompt: Write 1 launch blog post (700-900 words, markdown) for openpatent.ai titled 'The Hive Is Open: Disclose First. AI Second.' The post must (a) name the AI-idea-theft problem with one concrete example, (b) introduce the 6-layer cryptographic disclosure (SHA-3/512, HMAC, Ed25519, Bitcoin OTS, C2PA, hash-chained audit), (c) walk through the $10 / $149 / $999 / $2499 / $4999 tier ladder, (d) reference the 10+ jurisdiction legal framework (US 35 USC 102, EU eIDAS, UK Patents Act, China Hangzhou 2018, France Marseille 2025, WIPO 2022), (e) end with the waitlist CTA. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {title:string, body:string, signature:string}.
